title: Doorbells
description: A simple doorbell datapack that adds fun doorbells to your world!
body:
# Doorbells
- Adds fun and simple doorbells to your world! 
- Each doorbell comes with its own sound, whether it would be variations of oak or a completely new one!
## Usage:
- To get a doorbell, simply right click a gold nugget or a note block on any button and it will become a doorbell.
- To remove it, break the button and it will return to being a normal button.
### Demo:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/u8r3NwqZ6NQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="1" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Additional Info:
- This does not affect any gameplay interactions like redstone and such and is purely cosmetic.
